rationale: Gov't Code §2001.027 governs withdrawal of proposed administrative rules after six months. The proposed change is a statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b), not an agency rule. No conflict; any implementing rulemaking would simply follow normal §2001.027 timelines.
quote: A proposed rule is withdrawn six months after the date of publication of notice of the proposed rule in the Texas Register if a state agency has failed by that time to adopt, adopt as amended, or withdraw the proposed rule.
_note: No conflict between a legislative statutory amendment and an administrative procedure statute governing agency rulemaking timelines.
